prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L 16V ABA (engine code: ABA) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a balanced crankshaft for high-RPM reliability (redline set to 7,800 RPM via standalone ECU).

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (hand-fabricated by Schimmel Performance) and a Tial 44mm external wastegate (set to 1.2 bar boost).

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 40mm front/35mm rear spring rates) paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars, polybushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1100K), and spherical bearing front control arms (034 Motorsport, part #034-404-101S).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Santana GTS-specific widebody kit (BRZ/86-inspired overfenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a carbon fiber duckbill rear spoiler by Seibon).

OEM+ restomod: Retro-fitted Euro-spec Santana GX trim (1985) with Recaro SRD seats (upholstered in Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts), Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a custom gauge cluster by Defi (3.5-inch boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR gauges).

Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9 +15 (front) and 16x10 +25 (rear) with Toyo R888R tires (225/45/16 front, 265/40/16 rear), paired with custom 5x100 to 5x112 hub adapters (KMAC) for aggressive fitment.
